basic_details.job_title: ANGRAU Recruitment 2026 - Walkin for Senior Research Fellow, Young Professional-II Posts
basic_details.short_information: Acharya N.G. Ranga Agricultural University (ANGRAU) Senior Research Fellow, Young Professional-II Notification 2026 has been released on 23 June 2026 on the official website angrau.ac.in. A total of 2 vacancies have been announced through the ANGRAU Senior Research Fellow, Young Professional-II Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.age_details: Minimum 21 years and maximum 40 years (Age relaxation of 5 years for SC/ST/Women)
age_limit.details: Minimum Age: 21 years Maximum Age: 40 years Age Relaxation: 5 years for SC/ST/Women candidates.

qualification.education_qualification: M.Sc.(Ag.) in Soil Science/Agronomy with 4/5 years Bachelor's degree in Agriculture from ICAR accredited University/College with minimum one research publication.
qualification.details: Senior Research Fellow: M.Sc.(Ag.) in Soil Science/Agronomy with 4/5 years Bachelor's degree in Agriculture from ICAR accredited University/College with minimum one research publication. Desirable: Knowledge in Computer, Data analysis, soil/plant analysis etc. Young Professional-II: M.Sc.(Ag.) in Soil Science/Agronomy with 4/5 years Bachelor's degree in Agriculture from ICAR accredited University/College with minimum one research publication. Desirable: Knowledge in Computer, Data analysis, soil/plant analysis etc.

salary_details.details: Senior Research Fellow: Rs.37000+HRA Young Professional-II: Rs.42000/- pm fixed

selection_process: Walk-in interview Verification of documents Decision of the selection committee

faq.question: Q1. What is the total number of vacancies announced by ANGRAU?
faq.answer: ANGRAU has announced a total of 2 vacancies for the posts of Senior Research Fellow and Young Professional-II through this walk-in interview drive.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for these posts?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess an M.Sc.(Ag.) in Soil Science/Agronomy with a 4/5 years Bachelor's degree in Agriculture from an ICAR accredited University/College, along with at least one research publication.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for applying to these positions?
faq.answer: The minimum age requirement is 21 years, and the maximum age limit is 40 years. Age relaxation is applicable for SC/ST/Women candidates.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for Senior Research Fellow and Young Professional-II?
faq.answer: The salary for Senior Research Fellow is Rs. 37000 + HRA, and for Young Professional-II, it is a fixed Rs. 42000/- per month.

faq.question: Q5. How can candidates apply for these ANGRAU recruitment posts?
faq.answer: Interested candidates need to attend a walk-in interview with all necessary documents. There is no online application process.

faq.question: Q6. What is the date and time for the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview is scheduled for 03 July 2026, and candidates should report by 10:00 AM for document verification.

faq.question: Q7. Where will the walk-in interview be conducted?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview will be conducted at the Agricultural Research Station, Anantapuramu, Nandyal, Andhra Pradesh, 515001.

faq.question: Q8. Are there any application fees for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The official notification does not mention any application fee for these positions.

faq.question: Q9. What documents should candidates bring to the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: Candidates must bring their application, biodata, original and attested copies of date of birth proof, educational qualifications, experience certificates, and photographs.

faq.question: Q10. Is there any experience required for these posts?
faq.answer: While a minimum of one research publication is required, specific years of experience are not explicitly detailed in the summary, but the qualification implies a research background.
